ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "statusCode": 500, "message": "Internal Server Error", "error": "INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR", "timestamp": now(), "correlationId": correlationId, "details": "An unexpected error occurred. Please contact support with transaction ID: " ++ correlationId }

on-error-propagate.doc:name: On Error Propagate - APIKIT Errors
on-error-propagate.type: APIKIT:BAD_REQUEST, APIKIT:NOT_FOUND, APIKIT:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED, APIKIT:NOT_ACCEPTABLE, APIKIT:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE, APIKIT:NOT_IMPLEMENTED

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var errorRegistry = { "BAD_REQUEST": { status: 400, message: "Bad Request - The request could not be understood or was missing required parameters", details: "The request could not be processed due to invalid or missing required parameters" }, "NOT_FOUND": { status: 404, message: "Not Found - The requested resource could not be found", details: "The requested external resource was not found" }, "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED": { status: 405, message: "Method Not Allowed - The HTTP method is not supported for this endpoint", details: "The HTTP method used in the request is not allowed for the requested resource" }, "NOT_ACCEPTABLE": { status: 406, message: "Not Acceptable - The server cannot produce a response matching the Accept headers", details: "The requested resource cannot generate content acceptable to the client based on Accept headers" }, "UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE": { status: 415, message: "Unsupported Media Type - The request payload format is not supported", details: "The Content-Type of the request payload is not supported by this endpoint" }, "NOT_IMPLEMENTED": { status: 501, message: "Not Implemented - The requested functionality is not yet implemented", details: "The server does not support the functionality required to fulfil the request" } } var identifier = error.errorType.identifier var mapped = errorRegistry[identifier] --- { "statusCode": mapped.status default 500, "message": mapped.message default error.description, "error": "HTTP_" ++ identifier, "timestamp": now(), "correlationId": correlationId, "details": error.detailedDescription default mapped.details }

on-error-propagate.doc:name: On Error Propagate - HTTP Request Errors
on-error-propagate.type: HTTP:BAD_GATEWAY, HTTP:BAD_REQUEST, HTTP:CLIENT_SECURITY, HTTP:CONNECTIVITY, HTTP:FORBIDDEN, HTTP:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, HTTP:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED, HTTP:NOT_ACCEPTABLE, HTTP:NOT_FOUND, HTTP:PARSING, HTTP:RETRY_EXHAUSTED, HTTP:SECURITY, HTTP:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE, HTTP:TIMEOUT, HTTP:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS, HTTP:UNAUTHORIZED, HTTP:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json var errorTypeMap = { "BAD_GATEWAY": { status: 502, msg: "Bad Gateway - Invalid response from upstream server" }, "BAD_REQUEST": { status: 400, msg: "Bad Request - The request could not be understood due to malformed syntax" }, "CLIENT_SECURITY": { status: 401, msg: "Client Security Error - A client security violation occurred" }, "CONNECTIVITY": { status: 503, msg: "Connectivity Error - Unable to connect to the remote service" }, "FORBIDDEN": { status: 403, msg: "Forbidden - You do not have permission to access this resource" }, "INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR": { status: 500, msg: "Internal Server Error - An unexpected error occurred" }, "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED": { status: 405, msg: "Method Not Allowed - The HTTP method is not supported for this endpoint" }, "NOT_ACCEPTABLE": { status: 406, msg: "Not Acceptable - The server cannot produce a response matching the Accept headers" }, "NOT_FOUND": { status: 404, msg: "Not Found - The requested resource could not be found" }, "PARSING": { status: 400, msg: "Parsing Error - The request or response body could not be parsed" }, "RETRY_EXHAUSTED": { status: 503, msg: "Retry Exhausted - Maximum retry attempts have been exceeded" }, "SECURITY": { status: 401, msg: "Security Error - A security violation occurred during the request" }, "SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE": { status: 503, msg: "Service Unavailable - The upstream service is temporarily unavailable" }, "TIMEOUT": { status: 504, msg: "Gateway Timeout - The upstream service did not respond in time" }, "TOO_MANY_REQUESTS": { status: 429, msg: "Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded, please retry after some time" }, "UNAUTHORIZED": { status: 401, msg: "Unauthorized - Authentication is required to access this resource" }, "UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE": { status: 415, msg: "Unsupported Media Type - The request payload format is not supported" } } var errIdentifier = error.errorType.identifier var mapped = errorTypeMap[errIdentifier] ---
{ "statusCode": mapped.status, "message": error.errorMessage.payload default "Internal server error", "error": errIdentifier, "timestamp": now(), "correlationId": correlationId, "details": mapped.msg default error.detailedDescription }

on-error-propagate.type: SALESFORCE:COMMUNICATION, SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY, SALESFORCE:INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS, SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT, SALESFORCE:INVALID_RESPONSE, SALESFORCE:LIMIT_EXCEEDED, SALESFORCE:MUTUAL_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED, SALESFORCE:NOT_FOUND, SALESFORCE:OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED, SALESFORCE:RETRY_EXHAUSTED, SALESFORCE:TIMEOUT, SALESFORCE:UNAVAILABLE
on-error-propagate.doc:name: On Error Propagate - Salesforce Errors

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "statusCode": payload.statusCode, "message": payload.message, "error": payload."error", "timestamp": now(), "correlationId": correlationId, "details": payload.details }
